channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: BBC Seeks Financial Records From Trump in Ongoing $10 Billion Defamation Lawsuit
item.description: A dispute over evidence discovery has emerged in President Donald Trump's ongoing $10 billion defamation lawsuit against the BBC. Trump filed the lawsuit after alleging that the broadcaster deceptivel...

item.title: Veteran '60 Minutes' Correspondents Choose to Remain at CBS Amid Leadership Upheaval and Mixed Public Reaction
item.description: Veteran '60 Minutes' correspondents Lesley Stahl, Bill Whitaker, and Jon Wertheim informed colleagues that they would remain with the long-running CBS news program despite recent firings that have sha...

item.title: DOJ Lawyer Argues in Court That Trump Administration Could Demolish Statue of Liberty Before Legal Challenge
item.description: During oral arguments before the U.S. Court of Appeals for the D.C. Circuit on Friday, a Justice Department lawyer representing the Trump administration stated that the government could potentially de...

item.title: Whistleblower Alleges Trump Administration Planned to Mark 2.7 Million Living People as Dead in Social Security Database
item.description: A former senior official at the Social Security Administration (SSA), Jeremiah Schofield, has come forward as a whistleblower, revealing that the Trump administration developed plans to add 2.7 millio...

item.title: Former Trump Official Warns White House Ballroom Donors Could Face Future Legal Scrutiny
item.description: A former Trump administration official, Miles Taylor, has warned that donors who contributed to President Donald Trump's White House ballroom project may face significant legal and ethical scrutiny in...

item.title: Three Veteran '60 Minutes' Correspondents Announce They Will Remain at the Program Amid CBS News Leadership Turmoil
item.description: Three longtime correspondents of CBS's news magazine program '60 Minutes'—Lesley Stahl, Bill Whitaker, and Jon Wertheim—have announced that they will remain with the show despite ongoing turmoil withi...

item.title: House members who left Congress to run for higher office suffer widespread primary losses, according to report
item.description: A growing number of U.S. House members who have left Congress to pursue higher political offices are experiencing unexpected electoral defeats, suggesting that leaving the House may now be a political...

item.title: Tony Dokoupil Pays Tribute to Scott Pelley Amid Turmoil at CBS News and '60 Minutes'
item.description: CBS Evening News anchor Tony Dokoupil publicly praised veteran journalist Scott Pelley following Pelley's dismissal from the long-running news program '60 Minutes.' During a broadcast, Dokoupil reflec...

item.title: Republican lawmakers express frustration over Trump’s policy decisions and legislative disruptions
item.description: According to reporting based on interviews with Republican congressional insiders, tensions are rising within the GOP over President Donald Trump’s recent actions and policy decisions. Senior aides an...

item.title: Data analysis shows declining support for Trump among rural voters ahead of 2026 midterms
item.description: A new political analysis highlighted by CNN data analyst Harry Enten suggests that President Donald Trump is experiencing a significant decline in support among rural voters, a key demographic that pr...

item.title: Brian Kilmeade Dismisses Optimism About a Potential Iran Deal During Fox News Broadcast
item.description: Fox News host Brian Kilmeade expressed skepticism about the possibility of a near-term agreement between the Trump administration and Iran during a live broadcast on June 5, 2026. The incident occurre...

item.title: Todd Blanche Says DOJ Is Implementing Measures to Prevent Future Prosecutions of Donald Trump
item.description: A Raw Story report highlights comments made by Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche during an interview with NewsNation host Katie Pavlich. According to the article, Blanche stated that he is put...

item.title: Wisconsin Farmers' Frustration with Trump Tariffs and Policies Puts Rep. Derrick Van Orden's Seat at Risk
item.description: U.S. Representative Derrick Van Orden, a Republican from Wisconsin's 3rd Congressional District and a strong supporter of President Donald Trump, faces a challenging re-election battle amid growing di...

item.title: Columnist Uses Shoe-Wearing Experiment to Criticize Loyalty Within Trump's Cabinet
item.description: A Raw Story article highlights a commentary by Slate writer Ian Prasad Philbrick, who conducted a personal experiment involving a pair of Florsheim dress shoes reportedly gifted by President Donald Tr...

item.title: Reports say Trump adopts a hardline stance amid growing Republican Senate resistance to key policy initiatives
item.description: According to reporting cited from The Washington Post and summarized by Raw Story, President Donald Trump is facing increasing resistance from Senate Republicans over several of his policy priorities ...

item.title: Actor James Hardy Killed in Stabbing Outside Tarzana Home; Suspect Arrested
item.description: Veteran actor James Hardy, 81, was found dead with a stab wound to the chest outside a residence in the Tarzana neighborhood of Los Angeles on the morning of June 3, 2026, according to police. Authori...

item.title: Internal CBS Dispute Grows After Leadership Changes at '60 Minutes'
item.description: CBS News president Bari Weiss is facing increasing internal criticism following a controversial restructuring of the long-running news program '60 Minutes.' According to a report cited by Raw Story, o...

item.title: White House Plans UFC Event for Trump's 80th Birthday Amid Declining Support Among Young Men
item.description: The White House is organizing a major Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) event on the South Lawn as part of President Donald Trump's 80th birthday celebrations on June 14, 2026. The spectacle, dubbe...

item.title: Ariana Grande Thanks Fans for Support of 'Hate That I Made You Love Me' Ahead of New Album Release
item.description: Ariana Grande has expressed her appreciation to fans following the strong reception of her new single, 'Hate That I Made You Love Me.' The singer shared a message on Instagram in which she said she wa...

item.title: SpaceX Targets $1.77 Trillion Valuation in Planned IPO While Remaining Unprofitable
item.description: SpaceX has announced plans for a landmark initial public offering that could value the company at approximately $1.77 trillion, potentially making it the largest IPO in history. According to the filin...
